name: Cheesy Pita Salad Sandwiches
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Low Cal. Italian Salad Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine tomato, cucumbers, alfalfa, red and green peppers, celery, pepper, and Italian salad dressing in a medium bowl. Toss well.
2. Set aside.
3. Divide cheese evenly into pocket bread halves. Cover with paper towels and microwave at medium-high power for 30 seconds to 1 minute, or until cheese melts.
4. Open sandwiches and stuff with equal amounts of vegetable mixture. Serve immediately.
